title: 当前核心问题：来源多元、类型混杂、边界不清
prompt:
Create a polished 16:9 Chinese slide image for a leadership-facing technical presentation. Title: 当前核心问题：来源多元、类型混杂、边界不清. Style: clean professional presentation, light background, management-report tone, evidence-driven and strategic, high Chinese readability.

Goal: show that charging configuration knowledge comes from multiple sources, mixes different knowledge types in the same material, and lacks clear ontology boundaries, so it cannot form stable mapping and reuse from business to command.

Layout: left-center-right diagnosis layout.

Left zone labeled subtly as 现有来源. Show 3 structured source cards:
- 产品文档
- 专家经验
- MOP脚本
Add a short visual cue that these sources are all useful but heterogeneous.

Center zone labeled as 计费场景中的真实混杂片段. This must be the main focus. Do NOT show four already-separated layers with arrows. Instead show one unified charging-case card based on real materials, where multiple knowledge types coexist in one working context.
Inside the same card, present these grouped snippets:
- 业务语义：差异化计费、默认计费、配额耗尽动作
- 特性能力：内容计费、在线计费、融合计费
- 配置任务：配置计费动作链、配置识别规则、配置用户模板绑定
- 命令规则：ADD URR、ADD URRGROUP、ADD PCCPOLICYGRP、ADD RULE
- 真实场景例子：访问 www.huawei.com、访问 IMS 业务、any 默认业务、异常场景流量
The visual impression must be that these pieces appear together in one material and one work context, not that they are already cleanly layered.

Right zone labeled subtly as 结果. Show 4 consequence cards:
- 边界难判断
- 复用困难
- 依赖专家经验
- 难支撑生成、核查、诊断

Bottom takeaway strip:
配置知识来源多元、知识类型混杂、对象边界不清，导致无法形成从业务到命令的稳定映射与复用。

Visual direction:
- calm executive technical style
- left side structured source cards
- center strongest visual object, like one dense but readable evidence card from the charging scenario
- right side aligned consequence cards
- use blue-gray structure with restrained amber emphasis
- no watermark, no unrelated logos, no slide number
- exact readable Chinese text
